summary: Phase 1 testing complete: 16/16 backend tests pass, frontend pages accessible. Messaging infrastructure (conversations, channels, leads, messages) fully working. i18n has partial issue - Portuguese shows initially after onboarding but may revert to English on certain navigations.

integration_issues.issue: Portuguese language shows correctly on dashboard after onboarding selection, but reverts to English when navigating to other pages via direct URL. User profile has ui_language='pt' but i18n might not sync on page refresh.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate i18n language persistence issue - Portuguese selected in onboarding but pages may show English after navigation
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.applyLanguage is called on login/signup but i18n.js reads savedLang from localStorage on init - there may be a race condition or the localStorage value not being set correctly
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed conversations, messages, leads during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features all working: conversations CRUD, messages send/receive, channels create/list, leads CRUD with stages, WhatsApp webhook endpoint. Dashboard shows real stats. Chat inbox shows 9+ conversations with channel filters. CRM shows 8 leads in 5-stage kanban. Agents marketplace shows 22 agents. i18n configured for EN/PT/ES but may have persistence issues.

backend_apis: POST /api/webhook/whatsapp - receives messages (200, MOCKED - no real Evolution API)
frontend_pages: Dashboard - shows real stats, quick actions, plan status
Chat/Inbox - shows conversation list, channel filters, click opens detail
Chat message send - working via input and send button
Agents Marketplace - shows 22 agents with ratings and deploy buttons

mocked_apis.WhatsApp webhook: POST /api/webhook/whatsapp endpoint exists but no real Evolution API connected. Webhook receives test payloads but returns 'no_channel' since no real WhatsApp instance configured.
